svg.title: DevDocs AI — Full System Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing ingestion pipeline, RAG pipeline, evaluation layer, and frontend for DevDocs AI project

g.text: Runs on demand or schedule — indexes the repo into pgvector

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the GitHub API ingestion work in DevDocs AI?')
sendPrompt('How does chunking strategy work in DevDocs AI?')
sendPrompt('Which embedding model should I use for DevDocs AI?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up pgvector for DevDocs AI?')

g.text: Every user question triggers this flow

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the query rewriter work in a RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is HyDE query expansion and should I use it?')
sendPrompt('How does vector retrieval + BM25 reranking work?')
sendPrompt('How do I design the system prompt for a codebase RAG assistant?')

g.text: Runs offline against a test set — scores go in README

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build a Ragas test set for a code RAG project?')
sendPrompt('Which Ragas metrics should I use for DevDocs AI?')
sendPrompt('How do I display Ragas scores in a README?')
sendPrompt('How do I use GitHub Actions to run Ragas on each commit?')
sendPrompt('What should the DevDocs AI frontend look like?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a streaming chat UI in Next.js?')
sendPrompt('How do I show source file citations in a RAG UI?')
sendPrompt('How do I display live Ragas scores in the DevDocs AI UI?')

svg.text: ↑ Click any node to go deeper
